nodes.name: 橫斑漁鴞
nodes.summary: 橫斑漁鴞（Pel's fishing owl，学名 Scotopelia peli），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括海岸湿地、河口、沼泽，主要威胁包括气候变化。
nodes.shortSummary: 橫斑漁鴞（學名：Scotopelia peli）是鴟鴞科斑漁鴞屬下的貓頭鷹。牠們分布於非洲撒哈拉以南多個地區的森林或有大型樹木的水域附近，體長約55—61公分，翼展150—153公分，是斑漁鴞屬下最大的物種。沒有亞種分化。 橫斑漁鴞全身薑褐色的帶斑點或條紋羽毛，及沒有耳冠的圓滑…

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It can be found in swamps and estuaries at sea level up to an elevation of around . Its favorite habitat is riverine forests with large trees, although large numbers are also found on islands with large, old trees within larger rivers, swamps or lakes, so long as the islands are not too far from the bank

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Thus, the species is classified as least concern by the IUCN. The species may come under pressure in Namibia in the future if, as predicted by climate change models, Namibia becomes drier and the growing human population increasingly relies on and impacts the region's river systems.Simmons, R.E
